trending_videos.title: State of Play | June 2, 2026 [English]
trending_videos.description:
State of Play returns Tuesday, June 2 with more than 60 minutes of updates, announcements, and gameplay reveals from top studios around the world. 

To kick things off, you’ll get a closer look at Marvel’s Wolverine. Insomniac Games will share more from its upcoming third-person action-adventure game showing off Logan’s brutal and relentless combat along with some new details. This all-new take on the comic book legend launches on PS5 September 15.

Watch the State of Play broadcast live Tuesday, June 2 at 2:00pm PT / 5:00pm ET / 11:00pm CEST | June 3 at 6:00am JST on YouTube and Twitch. The broadcast will be in English, with Japanese subtitles also available. We hope to see you then!

Regarding co-streaming and video-on-demand (VOD)

trending_videos.title: RAYMAN LEGENDS RETOLD | Reveal Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Rayman Legends Retold brings back legendary platforming with new story twists, a brand‑new realm, Kung Foot, and an expanded soundtrack. Launches October 1.

Sync every move to the beat in unforgettable musical stages, soar across worlds on epic dragon rides, and explore a mysterious new realm in the Glade of Dreams. Play solo or dive into the chaos in up to four‑player couch co‑op, then face off in the fan‑favorite Kung Foot, now bigger and better than ever.

Pre-order available now: raymanlegendsretold.com 

About Rayman Legends Retold:
Embark on a bold reimagining of the critically acclaimed platformer, enhanced with stunning 3D visuals and an immersive new story leading to a mysterious new realm. Play the adventure solo or in up to four‑player couch co‑op, jam through all‑new musical stages, saddle up for epic dragon rides, and more!

Follow Rayman on: 
INSTAGRAM:
instagram.com/rayman_game/
FACEBOOK
facebook.com/rayman/
X:
x.com/RaymanGame

#Ubisoft #rayman

trending_videos.title: Silo — Season 3 Official Trailer | Apple TV
trending_videos.description:
The end of the world had a beginning. Silo returns July 3 only on Apple TV.  https://apple.co/_Silo

Season three of “Silo” continues the saga of a dystopian society of 10,000 people living underground under mysterious circumstances, while revealing an origin story set centuries earlier. In the present, Juliette Nichols (Ferguson) survives her forced “cleaning” but returns with memory loss as the silo recovers from rebellion and faces a dangerous new threat. Meanwhile, in the “Before Times,” journalist Helen Drew (Jessica Henwick) and Congressman Daniel Keene (Ashley Zukerman) uncover a conspiracy that pulls them into a chain of events with catastrophic, irreversible consequences. The series is based on Hugh Howey’s New York Times bestselling trilogy, “Silo.”

The ensemble cast returning alongside Ferguson includes Common, Harriet Walter, Chinaza Uche, Avi Nash, Alexandria Riley, Shane McRae, Remmie Milner, Rick Gomez, Billy Postlethwaite and Clare Perkins. Joining the cast for season

specific_insights.description: There is a significant interest in trailer content, with 5 out of 10 trending videos being trailers for movies, TV shows, or games. This indicates a strong audience demand for upcoming entertainment previews.
Gaming-related content, including trailers and event coverage, constitutes 30% of the trending videos. This suggests a robust interest in gaming news and announcements.
A single music video by IShowSpeed indicates a niche but significant interest in music content, particularly if tied to popular events like the World Cup.
Content related to cultural events and nostalgia, such as revisiting childhood experiences, holds a smaller but notable share of the trending space.

top_channels.trend: Consistently produces high-quality, anticipated trailers that capture audience interest.
Regularly features in trending due to major gaming announcements and event coverage.
Leverages music tied to major global events to achieve viral success.
Capitalizes on game nostalgia and fan favorites to generate buzz.
Utilizes popular media critiques and fan discussions to engage audiences.

trailer_content.opportunity: Expand trailer content with interactive or extended behind-the-scenes elements to engage the audience further.
trailer_content.justification: The dominance of trailer content indicates potential for deeper engagement through additional content forms.

gaming_announcements.opportunity: Leverage major gaming events and announcements with exclusive content or live coverage.
gaming_announcements.justification: The significant interest in gaming suggests room for growth in live event coverage and exclusive reveals.

event-tied music.opportunity: Create music content associated with major global events or trends to capture audience interest.
event-tied music.justification: IShowSpeed's success with an event-tied music video highlights potential in this area.

nostalgia-driven content.opportunity: Develop content that taps into nostalgia, particularly in gaming or childhood experiences, to attract a dedicated audience.
nostalgia-driven content.justification: The presence of nostalgia-driven content shows an appetite for such themes among viewers.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
